title: One Day Surgery Center, Dacy Care Surgery, Day Surgery, Short Stay
heading: O NE DAY SURGERY CENTER
description: Surgeries which are planned and selected for Day Care or One Day Surgery, Patient cand be discharged on the same day of surgery in select cases who are eligible as per Protocols of Day Surgery.
